full_text:
Ze Rong 笮融
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ze Rong (笮融)was born in Danyang. Buddhist, fought against Sun Ce, had a record of betrayal and murder. Ze Rong was affiliated with Tao Qian, Zhao Yu, Xue Li, and Liu Yao. Ze Rong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
